title: Pilot Pre-Registration
description: Schema for pre-registered pilot selection logic. Freezes rules before assay results are known.

preregistered_by.description: Person or agent who created the registration

candidate_pool_source.description: Path or description of the candidate pool

candidate_pool_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the pool CSV

selection_rules.description: Machine-readable rules used to select candidates

exclusion_criteria.description: Criteria that would cause a candidate to be excluded

pass_fail_criteria.description: Criteria for determining pilot success or failure
